name: Migration playbook — 6 steps
description: A practical, research-backed 6-step migration playbook for moving latency-sensitive paths to an edge-first or hybrid architecture.

step.name: Assess
step.text: Map latency targets, data gravity, regulatory constraints, and cost sensitivity.

step.name: Prototype
step.text: Build a narrow-edge pilot for the most latency-sensitive path.

step.name: Evaluate
step.text: Compare P95/P99 latency, error rates, and cost vs cloud baseline.

step.name: Pilot
step.text: Run a 2–4 week A/B test with representative traffic.

step.name: Migrate
step.text: Roll out phased migration with feature flags, blue/green or canary deploys.

step.name: Operate
step.text: Add distributed tracing, edge-aware observability, and runbook for incident response.
